TrueFi: Credit Vault

span.p:
present in every protocol,
standardized in NONE

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
How to read this diagram
Each surveyed protocol fills the same generic slots; the right column lists how a
given protocol implements that slot. The waterfall slot is the exception:
universally present, nowhere standardised. That gap is the target of the proposed standard.
